description: 「これからせんぱいには体験版として、わたしとデートしてもらいます！」本作は、片想いをしているバスケ部のマネージャー桜木桃花と、キャプテンを務める榎本海斗、ふたりの関係を描いたフルボイスの青春アドベンチャーゲームです。※全編無料でプレイが可能です。

name: 悠久之树
description: "Eternal Tree" is a turn-based combat role-playing game that tells the story of a journey spanning the Divine Era and the modern age. A grand epic, unknown challenges, and the continent of Titalyera await your exploration. Your adventure will shape the future of this world.
developer: Shanghai GuangYan Network Technology Co., Ltd
publisher: Shanghai GuangYan Network Technology Co., Ltd

name: Telepath of Evil
description: 나의 유일한 이해자를 둘러싼 구원, 믿음, 배신과 증오의 이야기. 지금 다운로드하여 새로운 비주얼노벨을 만나보세요.

name: Project Nihilum - Zero
description: Project Nihilum Zero is a narrative-driven Visual Novel. Discover the twisted story from different points of views and make your own choices. Discover 1 or 3 abilities: Mind Glimpse, Shape Shift and Hybrid. Use your ability wisely to see the past, influence the present and shape the future.

name: 紅蜘蛛外伝：暗花
description: The latest in the “Red Spider” series of Hong Kong noir visual novel with full japanese voice acting, “Red Spider Anecdote: The Longest Nite” is now available with all-new graphics. The hard-boiled story of two female protagonists is set in Thailand in 2009. Play time: 2-4 hours

name: 拟态生还
description: A click oriented plot game where players advance the plot by clicking and make choices at critical moments to influence the fate of the protagonist.

name: Happy Home: Prologue
description: Explore the beginning of a new horrifying story in this mixture of a text-based and a 2D game. Emily's world is about to turn upside down, maybe in more ways than anyone is able to realize yet.

name: The Crossroads
description: Serve customers and guide their stories to their best, or worse, endings. Help resolve their conflicts with a chat and a drink!

name: Providentia Academy
description: Providentia Academy is a 2D visual novel with the themes of romance, mystery and horror.

name: Dr. COG
description: Dr. Cog is a deck-building roguelike game using gears. Operate the memory restoration machine, turn gears, discover and enhance them, and build synergies. Complete the memory restoration within the time limit, recover the client's lost memories, and reach the final chapter.

name: Noble's Life: Kingdom Reborn - Prologue
description: Experience the first months after a brutal assault on your own estate in the free prologue of a realistic simulator of a medieval noble combined with a strategy game of historical depth. Manage your town and villages and make decisions in non-linear events.

name: Just Squat
description: Just Squat is a shmup and visual Nobel game that focuses on boss fight by growing up a boy. Grow the boy by encountering various events at the gym and school, and push Babel out with all your might! The difficulty of boss fight and the boy's growth will be determined by the exercise you choose!

name: BROK - Natal Tail, A New Christmas
description: A Christmas tale set in the world of BROK the InvestiGator, presented as a visual novel.

name: 女王蟻のPerfume エピソード０-切り裂きジャックの狂愛-/Queen Ant Perfume Episode0-The Mad Love of Jack the Ripper-
description: A visual novel game set in “London at the end of the 19th century” and “modern Tokyo”. The game depicts a love episode between you and a male suspect that “Watson-kun,” the assistant of a famous detective (you), witnesses while investigating a threatening letter sent by Jack the Ripper.

name: 沉舟：序章
description: Play as a group of underground workers who fight in the dark, and stage a treacherous spy war story in Nanjing during World War II. How will you respond to identity crises, betrayals, and collapsed beliefs? Loyalty or betrayal, abandon others or be abandoned...

name: 偕老同穴 Euplectella
description: A short Visual Novel. Player will play as a reclusive writer who explores in her own dreams by moving and clicking, listening to and recording the story of a dream-prisoner. As the story progresses, she can no longer remain detached ...

name: The Ouroboros Express
description: Play as Vivienne Sanssouci, a daring journalist who has been tasked to review the Ouroboros Express. She quickly notices that this is not your regular train—and a devastating secret changes her life forever, and that of the other passengers…

name: DEAD LAMB WALKING
description: A story about a dead lamb walking.

name: Mr. Rightaway
description: 古风多结局乙女向文字冒险游戏，完全免费

name: Fateful Destiny
description: Can you uncover the truth, or will the mystery remain buried? Explore a village, make final choices, and shape a story you can never undo.

name: Arima Lodge
description: One of Arima Lodge's bellhops rides the elevator for his usual shift, but, after a man rushes into the elevator and compels him to get to the rooftop instead, he starts to realize something very serious is amiss.

name: Dogs
description: Dogs is a relaxing and fun game where you click on adorable dogs to increase your score. Featuring a variety of cute dog breeds, simple gameplay, and charming visuals, it's perfect for dog lovers and players of all ages.

name: TOY BOX
description: A pull-apart puzzle visual novel whose fragments stitch the story together.

name: JOBifAI
description: Land your dream job with JOBifAI! With an impressive CV and AI-crafted portfolio, you've got an interview at Grizley Studios! However, you forgot what you submitted... can you convince the art director that you're the perfect fit anyway?

name: Final Hour
description: In a world on its deathbed, explore and connect with your neighbors for one last day.

name: BubbleBeast DigiDungeon
description: Pop bubbles, fight monsters, and keep rocking to the beat in BubbleBeast DigiDungeon, an arcade-style music puzzle game!

name: Cryspace
description: Cryspace is a fresh visual novel with a nostalgic flavor. Talk to your friends online, meet with them in-person, and allow your friend group to grow in numbers, or fall into despair through your own decision-making and discretion. Experience the first few dates with Sam for FREE.

name: Hail Britannia
description: Hail Britannia is a text-based game with lite RPG elements set in an alternate 1944 where the Central Powers won World War 1.

name: akabos
description: Do you hate squares? Then this game is for you! After all, the dog also hates squares. Help the dog to destroy all the squares!

name: Sol
description: Fa mesos que ha desaparegut el sol, però el despertador continua sonant cada dia a les 8:00. Una novel·la visual en català.

name: 作为游戏和诗歌的世界
description: 优尔·阿莱夫和妹妹安雅·阿莱夫在幼年时因病被父母抛弃，后被爱尔兰都柏林的一家酒馆的老板娘西尔莎收留。在一次出差过程中，优尔意外的邂逅了自己梦中来历不明的少女，后得知对方的名字叫做艾尔温。面对这个熟悉又陌生的少女，优尔和她踏上了收集手稿和解开过去真相的旅程。

name: 失欲
description: 《失欲》是一部基於帝國主義時期歐洲的短篇反烏托邦小說，它通過多線敘事，描繪了奧盧格帝國從資本主義逐漸過渡到半奴役制度的過程，呼籲人們反資本、反戰、反封建。 The English version is still being translated and produced.

name: All We Need
description: All We Need is a first-person horror exploration. Uncover supernatural mysteries, face chilling encounters, and navigate haunting landscapes. Unravel the consequences of Jack's fateful decision. Survive the psychological challenges that await. Can you escape the horrors?

name: I Wanna Be A Game Dev!
description: Live out your school days as you navigate the rocky world of game development! Can you make an amazing game, or will something get in the way?

name: Echoes of Madness - The Hawthorne Case
description: Detective Norman faces one of the longest nights of his career. Alone, he searches for the missing girl, Felicia, only to discover that this case runs far deeper than he ever imagined.

name: Shiina Taki's Decameron
description: Shiina Taki's Decameron is a doujin interactive fiction based on anime「BanG Dream! It's MyGO!!!!!」. The story concentrates on Shiina Taki, the drummer and song writer of MyGO!!!!! and her fight against fate till the last breath.

name: Angel Wings: Endless Night
description: Trapped in a haunted mansion with only your wits and an unlikely ally at your side, what will it take to survive this endless nightmare?

name: 잿빛의 행성
description: is an adventure game where you meet the Big Dipper, a star that grants wishes, and save the planet that has turned gray.

name: Itsy Bitsy Spider: Vengeance
description: Itsy Bitsy Spider: Vengeance is a fast-paced movement-shooter roguelite with a focus on speedrunning. Take control of a spider with a gun who is tasked with fighting it's way to the top of the waterspout!

name: 28 Leicester Square
description: Something has gone wrong at the 28 Leicester Square manor. Danger lurks around every corner. In this horror puzzle game, you will uncover the truth of what happened to this place and reveal secrets that should have stayed hidden. Every man has two sides; let's just hope you help the right one.

name: DREADHOLM
description: A dark fantasy isometric online RPG featuring classes, randomized loot, instanced dungeons, and party-based boss fights. Built from scratch by a solo developer. Free to play, no microtransactions.

name: False Flag
description: False Flag is a small platform game where the goal isn’t to reach the end. Instead, you need to find a way to die in each level. Every stage is about figuring out how to fail.

name: Recipe For Disaster
description: Recipe for Disaster is an all new competitive multiplayer cooking game with a game show format. As an aspiring chef, gather ingredients to build powerful food-themed weapons and fight against your friends!

name: ToyBoxers!
description: Punch, Shoot, Or Explode your friends to be the last toy standing in this fast paced physics PVP party game!

name: Set Yourself on Fire
description: A quiet town awaits death. Two young women fall in love.

name: Drowned Caves
description: Atmospheric, short, and simple adventure puzzle game that gives the player freedom in finding the solution to the obstacles they encounter along the way in the drowned caves.

name: The Brewline - Prologue
description: Step into the world of bootleg booze in this story-driven, single-player sim! Grow your crops, brew your drinks, bond with eccentric customers, and bottle it all under your own brand. Uncover the truth behind your brother’s arrest, complete quirky missions, and build your underground empire.

name: 龙城传奇
description: 屠龙宝刀再现，龙城等你称王！ 《龙城传奇》三职业高爆国战版，传承二十年经典，正版授权，原汁原味！装备全靠打，交易全自由，BOSS爆极品，技能靠手打——在这里，没有花里胡哨的套路，只有最纯粹的热血攻沙！

name: Selena's Charm: Sweet Home
description: A free-to-start match-3 puzzle game with mansion restoration and decorating. Play the first 20 levels, help Selena begin bringing a grand home back to life, and unlock the full experience through DLC.

name: 暗黑战神
description: 经典永不褪色，热血再度沸腾！以原汁原味的传奇玩法为核心，打造高爆率、高自由度的MMORPG盛宴。在这里，装备全靠打，神装遍地爆，刀刀暴击、秒怪升级的极致爽感贯穿全程！

name: 16 Personalities Simulator
description: 本游戏是基于荣格心理学理论，以及现在时代的环境制作的测试分享交流游戏。游戏免费，没有任何内购要素，给您带来纯净的测试和分享体验。

name: 龙王捕鱼
description: 《龙王捕鱼》采用全新顶尖3D引擎打造，呈现超强国风美术表现力，原汁原味复刻街机经典玩法。游戏内设多个东方神话奇幻渔场，捕获各种山海经中的神秘强大BOSS。炫酷的仙境场景、超高清的画质，给您带来绝对震撼的国风视听盛宴。

name: 驱入虚空
description: Into the Void is a sci-fi third-person action shooter focused on loot collection and build synergy. Freely combine armor, weapons, and mechs across diverse levels. Obtain all gear through gameplay. Befriend Chronomancers, and save a world plunged into chaos by the fall of the Celestial Palace.
developer: 杭州紧张树科技有限公司
publisher: 海南紧张树科技有限公司

name: Predecessor
description: Inspired by the legacy of Paragon, built with love by the community, and powered by Unreal Engine 5, Predecessor is the ultimate fusion of shooter action and MOBA strategy. Join more than 2,000,000 players and play for FREE now!

name: UNDECEMBER: 4th Anniversary
description: UNDECEMBER is a Hack & Slash Action RPG in which players are able to surpass the conventional limits of skills by endlessly combining variety of Skill and Link Runes. Become a Rune Hunter and experience the joy of farming and growth!

name: Deceit 2
description: Deceit 2 is an online social deduction horror game. Inspire fear as the Infected, investigate as the Innocent, or create mayhem as the Cursed. Trapped with friends and strangers: who can you trust to help you escape?
notes: Có DLC trả phí; Easy Anti-Cheat [Kernel]

name: SPLITGATE: Arena Reloaded
description: SPLITGATE: Arena Reloaded fuses the best of Splitgate 1 & 2, bringing back that classic arena shooter feel. Jump into fast-paced arena modes or drop into Arena Royale, a battle royale built on arena DNA. Play Season 2 now.
notes: Có DLC trả phí; RedKard (1047 Games) [Kernel]

name: Stronghold Kingdoms
description: A massively multiplayer grand strategy game, Stronghold Kingdoms is about forging alliances, political mind games, city-building and castle sieges with thousands of other players!

name: 天月麻雀 (Amatsuki Mahjong)
description: Amatsuki Mahjong is a ACG style mahjong game that offers real-time multiplayer online matches. It features four styles of mahjong: Japanese, Sichuan, Taiwanese, and Hong Kong Mahjong. Enjoy a variety of play styles tailored to your preferences.

name: Blackjack 21: Blackjackist
description: Blackjack is an exciting game that any player is sure to enjoy. Place your bet, get more points than the dealer and win chips. Feel the risk as you dive into the casino atmosphere and hit the big time!

name: Pool 2D - Poolians
description: Pool 2D is a free pool game including 8-ball,9-ball,15-ball,3-ball,rotation and blackjack. The graphics are spectacular and the physics are realistic and accurate. Whether you play against the computer or against real players from all over the world online, the action is smooth and fast paced!

name: Poker Championship
description: Play the most authentic Texas Hold’em Poker App. Fair play guaranteed by the officially certified Random Number Generator implemented for every hand dealing. Compete with outstanding players throughout the world in real time and be the World Champion!

name: Shadowverse CCG
description: Four million battles every day. One Shadowverse. Japan's #1 strategic card game. Made by card gamers for card gamers.

name: AdventureQuest 3D
description: The Void King is raising an army in secret. Death has chosen you as his champion to bring him down. Adventure & quest alongside your friends in this bizarre cross-platform MMORPG from the creators of the original, and comically-redundantly named... AdventureQuest! Weekly releases!

name: SCP: Containment Breach 2
description: Survive the chaos of SCP Foundation! Step into a thrilling SCP horror experience with story-driven co-op, intense PvP Breach mode, and randomized maps. Play as Class-D, scientist, SCPs, and more, each role bringing unique challenges in an unpredictable, immersive facility.

name: The Walking Dead: No Man's Land
description: Step into the dangerous world of The Walking Dead: No Man's Land. Lead survivors in turn-based strategy battles, manage resources, and make tough choices to ensure their survival. Fight walkers, build your base, and face endless dangers.

name: Tank Force: Online Shooter Game
description: Tank Force - the coolest free online tank shooter! This is a new word in online tank battles, which combines the best qualities of a tank simulator and thrilling arcade battles.

name: Rogue Company
description: Join 20+ million players in Rogue Company, the ultimate third-person tactical action shooter! Become an agent of Rogue Company and wield powerful weapons, high-tech gadgets, and game-changing abilities. Accept the mission and jump into a variety of 4v4 and 6v6 game modes. Play FREE today!

name: Operation: New Earth
description: Operation: New Earth is an intense sci-fi multiplayer strategy game in which you must command an advanced military facility to defend Earth from a hostile alien invasion. Create an alliance, gather resources, and unlock advanced technology to level up your stronghold!

name: Vegas Casino & Slots: Slottist
description: Discover the world's best Casino Slots Games! Play slots with unique game mechanics, explore amazing mini-games and master your casino skills!

name: SAS: Zombie Assault 4
description: Purge the undead! Intense action-shooter with deep rpg elements, including upgradeable guns and armor, unique class skills, and class special abilities. Entire game can be played single player or as a 4-player online co-op game, including PvP events like Last Man Standing.

name: Warhammer The Horus Heresy: Legions
description: A card battler based in the rich universe of the Horus Heresy, the origin story of Warhammer 40,000. Play through epic single-player campaigns, take part in draft tournaments based on famous battles, or build your own unstoppable deck and compete in fast and epic duels against players worldwide.

name: MARVEL Puzzle Quest
description: Collect Marvel characters and upgrade your unstoppable squad in this epic Super Hero Puzzle RPG! Fight on the tactical Match-3 board where every move is crucial, and master head-to-head PvP tournaments alongside high-stakes events all year round!

name: Lost Light
description: Join the "Firefly" task force and unveil the sinister plot behind the exclusion zone in the world of Lost Light. You could either scavenge for supplies or go out with guns blazing and plunder. Survive the brutal domain where danger lurks in every corner!

name: Puzzle Together Multiplayer Jigsaw Puzzles
description: Multiplayer jigsaw puzzles with voice chat! Play on your own or with friends, and feel like you're all sitting around the same table. Millions of puzzle images, upload your own, or create any puzzle you can imagine just by describing it!

name: Skillshot City
description: Loot, shoot, cast and drive in this chaotic PvP Roguelite. Level up fast, draft wild skills, and create crazy combos on the fly. Explore a GTA-style battle royale with no queues or downtime as you prepare to win the final fight. Climb the ranks solo or with friends in 3-man squads!

name: Once Upon a Galaxy
description: ONCE UPON A GALAXY is an easy to learn Card Battler with incredible strategic depth and near infinite fun! Which of your favorite characters from myth and fairy tale will you choose?

name: Screw Drivers
description: Crazy physics and high-speed races! Craft vehicles cleverly by combining building blocks and mechanical parts to create powerful drivetrains. Unlock new parts, race for the gold, and challenge your friends in multiplayer.

name: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodhunt
description: Bloodhunt is a thrilling free-to-play battle royale game set in Prague consumed by a ruthless war between vampire factions. Use your supernatural powers, weapons, and wit to hunt your rivals and dominate the night!

name: Westland Survival
description: Saddle up for the ultimate survival adventure in the untamed Wild West! Build your homestead, tame the wilderness, bounty hunt the outlaws, and duel against the dangers that lurk on the frontier. Do you have what it takes to be a legend of the West?

name: Armored Warfare
description: Wage war against players from around the world with an unstoppable arsenal of 300+ powerful armored combat vehicles. Compete in PvP tank combat, complete co-op missions, and crush your enemies on breathtaking maps, from scorching deserts to neon-drenched urban jungles.

name: SMASH LEGENDS
description: Play Smash Legends for free! Smash Legends is an exciting PVP action brawler where fairy tale Legends engage in a lively battle. Play solo or in a 3v3 team battle with your friends! Play now with Smashers from all over the world on Steam, iOS, and Android!
